name: Δ Hidden Forbidden Holy Ground
author: ᵂᶤʳᵉᵈ
description: ＂That which hides Heaven＂‚ Hulle Granz Cathedral‚ or Grima Raef Cathedral stands isolate at the navel of Alba's Lake․ After sealing the Shadow‚ one-by-one the eight gods and goddesses‚ angered and distraught by the wretched and foolishness of humans‚ left earth until none but Aurora remained․ Fearing that the light of heaven would again depart earth‚ the humans placed eight curses on Aurora and sealed her inside the church․ Some use to say that if you enter the church at 12˸00‚ you'll hear a girl crying․ Faithfully recreated from the game ․hack⁄⁄GU Last Recode
